scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter client dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter server build && pnpm --filter client build
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -n server,client,electron -c blue,green,cyan "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter client dev" "pnpm --filter fufan-cc-flow-electron dev"
scripts.electron:build: pnpm build && pnpm --filter fufan-cc-flow-electron build && pnpm --filter fufan-cc-flow-electron pack
